prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan VR38DETT (3.8L twin-turbo V6) with a bespoke dry-sump system by Titan Motorsport, paired with a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (84mm inducer) and a Tomei 87mm titanium exhaust manifold for optimized spool and flow dynamics. Fuel system upgraded to ID1700x injectors and a Syvecs S12 ECU with custom VR38DETT-specific maps for 1000+ hp on E85.

Chassis reinforcement via a Westfield XTR2-specific roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, MIG-welded) with integrated subframe connectors, paired with a Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (paddle-type) for VR38DETT torque handling.

Suspension overhaul with Öhlins TTX40 coilovers (2-way adjustable, 250lb/in springs) and polybushings by SuperPro, combined with a Westfield XTR2-specific front splitter by KW Automotive (carbon fiber, 3mm thickness) and a rear diffuser by APR Performance (3D-printed ABS, 50mm ground clearance). Braking system upgraded to AP Racing CP9430 calipers (6-pot front, 4-pot rear) with 355mm discs and Ferodo DS3000 pads.
estetica: Full carbon fiber bodywork by Westfield Composites, including a one-piece front clamshell (replacing OEM aluminum) and a rear wing by Voltex (Type 3, 1200mm width, 3D-printed carbon endplates). Paint scheme: PPG Custom Matte Graphite with satin black accents and a single racing stripe (3M Scotchcal 1080 series, 'Westfield Racing Green').

Interior stripped and refitted with a Sparco Pro2000 seat (FIA 8862-2009 certified) and a Schroth Profi II 6-point harness, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (suede, 320mm diameter) and a digital dash by AIM MXS Strada (1.3" display, VR38DETT CAN integration).

Lighting upgraded to Hella Rallye 3000 Supertones (7" diameter, 100W H3 bulbs) with custom aluminum mounts, and a rear LED light bar by Rigid Industries (E-Series Pro, 50" width) for track-day visibility. Wheel setup: BBS LM-R (17x9 ET25 front, 17x10 ET5 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 285/35/17 rear).
